node.text:
This app isn’t 16 KB compatible. APK and ELF alignment checks failed. This app will be run using page size compatible mode. For best compatibility, please recompile the application with 16 KB support. For more information, see https://developer.android.com/16kb-page-size
The following libraries are not 16 KB aligned:
• lib/x86_64/libreact_render_componentregistry.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libjsijniprofiler.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libbarhopper_v3.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libfabricjni.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/librrc_image.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_codegen_rncore.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/librrc_legacyviewmanagerinterop.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_render_debug.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_featureflags.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libexpo-gl.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libexpo-av.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libnative-filters.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/librninstance.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libc++_shared.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libuimanagerjni.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_render_core.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libimagepipeline.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libhermes_executor.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_newarchdefaults.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libcrashlytics-handler.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libfbjni.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreactnativejni.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_debug.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/librnskia.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libjscinstance.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreactperfloggerjni.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_nativemodule_core.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libstatic-webp.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libgifimage.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreactnativeblob.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_render_graphics.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreanimated.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libhermes.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libfolly_runtime.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libnative-imagetranscoder.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_devsupportjni.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_render_imagemanager.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_featureflagsjni.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_utils.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libruntimeexecutor.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/librrc_view.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libexpo-sqlite.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libjsinspector.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libexpo-modules-core.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libglog.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libimage_processing_util_jni.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libavif_android.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libcrashlytics-common.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libturbomodulejsijni.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libanimation-decoder-gif.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/librnscreens.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libface_detector_v2_jni.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libyoga.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libcrsqlite.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_render_mapbuffer.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libjsi.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libcrashlytics.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libreact_cxxreactpackage.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libhermesinstancejni.so : LOAD segment not aligned • lib/x86_64/libmapbufferjni.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned • lib/x86_64/libcrashlytics-trampoline.so : LOAD segment and uncompressed library are not aligned
